{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"flowchart TD A[Meadow Table Schema] --> B[generateCreateTableStatement] B --> C["SQL DDL String
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS..."] C --> D{createTable called?} D -->|Yes| E[pool.query executes DDL] E --> F{Result?} F -->|Success| G[Callback - no error] F -->|Error 42P07| H[Log warning - table exists] H --> G F -->|Other Error| I[Callback with error] D -->|No| J[Return DDL string for inspection] ","style":"notebook"}
